reviews.comment:
Lugar obligado y placentero,  para estirar las las piernas camino a Misiones o de vuelta a Corrientes.
Buena atención personal muy amable.
baños limpios y el mercadito buen café y sándwiches para poder continuar

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop and a pleasant place to stretch your legs on the way to Misiones or back to Corrientes. Excellent, very friendly staff. Clean restrooms and a small market with good coffee and sandwiches to fuel your journey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLOV95TEVBEAE
